authorityFull: WastewaterSCAN — Stanford University / Emory University / Verily
title: WastewaterSCAN — pathogen surveillance dashboard
notes: License: CC BY-NC 4.0 — permissible for EMERGENZ non-commercial dashboard use. Required attribution: 'These data were collected as part of the WastewaterSCAN / SCAN project, a partnership between Stanford University, Emory University, and Verily funded philanthropically through a gift to Stanford University.' Required citation: Boehm, A. B., et al. (2026). Pathogen nucleic acids data in wastewater solids from 147 treatment plants in the United States: 2024-2025. Data in Brief. COMMERCIAL USE CONSTRAINT: Any paid hosted-service deployment incorporating WastewaterSCAN data requires a separate commercial license from Stanford/Emory (contact: wwscan_stanford_emory@lists.stanford.edu). Pathogens tracked: SARS-CoV-2, Influenza A/B, RSV, hMPV, EV-D68, Norovirus GII, Rotavirus, Adenovirus F, C. auris, Hepatitis A, Measles, Mpox Ib/II, West Nile virus.

authorityFull: Brown University School of Public Health — Pandemic Center
title: Brown Pandemic Center — Weekly Tracking Reports
notes: Weekly expert tracking report used as a scoping signal only. Treat as secondary; verify all event-level claims against the cited primaries (WHO, CDC, Africa CDC, PAHO, USDA APHIS). License: No explicit license or terms of use published on pandemics.sph.brown.edu as of 2026-05-22; contact public_health@brown.edu for formal terms. Newsletter is published publicly via MailChimp for broad dissemination — no RSS feed exposed. No programmatic ingestion possible; reviewed manually. Individual reports: mailchi.mp/messages/pandemic-center-tracking-report-[date].

authorityFull: Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention
title: Africa CDC — Epidemic Intelligence Weekly Report (May 2026)
notes: Africa CDC's live continent-wide epidemic-intelligence weekly report; continent-level figures (e.g. cholera totals) live inside the linked weekly PDF, not scrapeable HTML. URL is month-dated — update as new reports publish. The /disease-outbreak/ archive is stale through 2024 and must not be used.

authorityFull: World Health Organization
title: WHO Mpox — Multi-country outbreak External Situation Report
notes: WHO mpox External Situation Report (#65, 30 Apr 2026). Clade-aware multi-country figures live inside the linked PDF. Africa CDC mpox pages were 404/stale, so WHO is the better live authority for this signal.
